seoTitle: Takalarup vs Talandji — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Takalarup and Talandji. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Takalarup and Talandji.
heading: Takalarup vs Talandji — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Takalarup, Western Australia and Talandji, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Takalarup and Talandji have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Takalarup or Talandji safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Takalarup has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Talandji scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Takalarup scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Talandji scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Takalarup or Talandji?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Takalarup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
